{"title": "Two Ways People Learn Python", "description": "Most learners collect syntax rules like trading cards — and drown by week six. Data science demands the second path: learning to think about problems first, then using Python to express solutions. You're not learning a language. You're learning to communicate with data. #Python #DataScience #Shorts", "tags": ["python for beginners", "learn python", "data science python", "python tutorial", "python thinking", "programming mindset", "python data science", "coding for beginners"]}
